allow: Bash(node -e "const c=[];process.stdin.on\('data',d=>c.push\(d\)\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const d=JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(c\).toString\(\)\);const q=d.qualityScore;const w=q?.warnings??[];const s=d.plan?.scenes??[];console.log\('QA-A | seed:',d.plan?._storySeedTopic,'| grade:',q?.grade,'| score:',q?.score,'| scenes:',s.length\);\(q?.breakdown??[]\).forEach\(b=>console.log\(' ',b.label,'|',b.earned+'/'+b.max\)\);w.forEach\(x=>console.log\(' ['+x.severity+'] sc'+x.sceneNumber+':',x.message.slice\(0,90\)\)\);console.log\('captions:',s.map\(\(x,i\)=>\(i+1\)+':'+x.caption\).join\(' | '\)\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('err',e.message\);}}\);")

Bash(node -e "const c=[];process.stdin.on\('data',d=>c.push\(d\)\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const d=JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(c\).toString\(\)\);const q=d.qualityScore;const w=q?.warnings??[];const s=d.plan?.scenes??[];console.log\('QA-B | seed:',d.plan?._storySeedTopic,'| grade:',q?.grade,'| score:',q?.score,'| scenes:',s.length\);\(q?.breakdown??[]\).forEach\(b=>console.log\(' ',b.label,'|',b.earned+'/'+b.max\)\);console.log\('captions:',s.map\(\(x,i\)=>\(i+1\)+':'+x.caption\).join\(' | '\)\);const fixed=w.filter\(x=>x.severity==='fixed'\);const warn=w.filter\(x=>x.severity==='warning'\);fixed.forEach\(x=>console.log\(' [fixed] sc'+x.sceneNumber+':',x.message.slice\(0,80\)\)\);warn.forEach\(x=>console.log\(' [WARN] sc'+x.sceneNumber+':',x.message.slice\(0,80\)\)\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('err',e.message\);}}\);")

Bash(node -e "const c=[];process.stdin.on\('data',d=>c.push\(d\)\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const d=JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(c\).toString\(\)\);const q=d.qualityScore;const w=q?.warnings??[];const s=d.plan?.scenes??[];console.log\('QA-C | seed:',d.plan?._storySeedTopic,'| grade:',q?.grade,'| score:',q?.score,'| scenes:',s.length\);\(q?.breakdown??[]\).forEach\(b=>console.log\(' ',b.label,'|',b.earned+'/'+b.max\)\);console.log\('captions:',s.map\(\(x,i\)=>\(i+1\)+':'+x.caption\).join\(' | '\)\);const fixed=w.filter\(x=>x.severity==='fixed'\);const warn=w.filter\(x=>x.severity==='warning'\);fixed.forEach\(x=>console.log\(' [fixed] sc'+x.sceneNumber+':',x.message.slice\(0,80\)\)\);warn.forEach\(x=>console.log\(' [WARN] sc'+x.sceneNumber+':',x.message.slice\(0,80\)\)\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('err',e.message\);}}\);")

Bash(node -e "const c=[];process.stdin.on\('data',d=>c.push\(d\)\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const d=JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(c\).toString\(\)\);const q=d.qualityScore;const w=q?.warnings??[];const s=d.plan?.scenes??[];const dup=w.filter\(x=>x.severity==='warning'&&\(x.message.includes\('중복'\)||x.message.includes\('유사'\)\)\);const cap=w.filter\(x=>x.severity==='warning'&&x.message.startsWith\('caption'\)\);const fix=w.filter\(x=>x.severity==='fixed'\);console.log\('=== QA FINAL-1 ==='\);console.log\('seed:',d.plan?._storySeedTopic\);console.log\('grade:',q?.grade,'| score:',q?.score,'| scenes:',s.length\);console.log\('중복:', dup.length,'| cap warn:',cap.length,'| fixed:',fix.length\);\(q?.breakdown??[]\).forEach\(b=>{if\(b.earned<b.max||b.max===0\)console.log\(' FAIL',b.label,b.earned+'/'+b.max\)}\);console.log\('captions:',s.map\(\(x,i\)=>\(i+1\)+':'+x.caption\).join\(' | '\)\);[...dup,...cap].forEach\(x=>console.log\(' [W]','sc'+x.sceneNumber+':',x.message.slice\(0,80\)\)\);fix.forEach\(x=>console.log\(' [F]','sc'+x.sceneNumber+':',x.message.slice\(0,80\)\)\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('err',e.message\);}}\);")

Bash(node -e "const c=[];process.stdin.on\('data',d=>c.push\(d\)\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const d=JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(c\).toString\(\)\);const q=d.qualityScore;const w=q?.warnings??[];const s=d.plan?.scenes??[];console.log\('=== QA FINAL-1b \(full breakdown\) ==='\);console.log\('seed:',d.plan?._storySeedTopic,'| grade:',q?.grade,'| score:',q?.score,'| scenes:',s.length\);\(q?.breakdown??[]\).forEach\(b=>console.log\(b.pass?'OK ':'FAIL',b.label,b.earned+'/'+b.max,b.reason||''\)\);console.log\('ALL warnings:'\);w.forEach\(x=>console.log\(' ['+x.severity+'] sc'+x.sceneNumber+':',x.message.slice\(0,90\)\)\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('err',e.message\);}}\);")

Bash(node -e "const c=[];process.stdin.on\('data',d=>c.push\(d\)\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const d=JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(c\).toString\(\)\);const q=d.qualityScore;const w=q?.warnings??[];console.log\('=== QA FINAL-1c ==='\);console.log\('seed:',d.plan?._storySeedTopic,'| grade:',q?.grade,'| score:',q?.score\);console.log\('warnings count:',w.length\);console.log\('breakdown 중복장면관리:', \(q?.breakdown??[]\).find\(b=>b.label==='중복 장면 관리'\)\);const narrs=\(d.plan?.scenes??[]\).map\(\(s,i\)=>\({i:i+1,n:s.narration}\)\);console.log\('narrations:'\);narrs.forEach\(\({i,n}\)=>console.log\(' sc'+i+':',n?.slice\(0,30\)\)\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('err',e.message\);}}\);")

Bash(node -e "const c=[];process.stdin.on\('data',d=>c.push\(d\)\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const d=JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(c\).toString\(\)\);const q=d.qualityScore;const w=d.warnings??[];console.log\('=== QA KEY ==='\);console.log\('seed:',d.plan?._storySeedTopic,'| grade:',q?.grade,'| score:',q?.score,'| scenes:',\(d.plan?.scenes??[]\).length\);console.log\('warnings count \(d.warnings\):',w.length,'vs qualityScore.warnings:',\(q?.warnings??[]\).length\);const dup=w.filter\(x=>x.severity==='warning'&&\(x.message.includes\('중복'\)||x.message.includes\('유사'\)\)\);const cap=w.filter\(x=>x.severity==='warning'&&x.message.startsWith\('caption'\)\);console.log\('중복:',dup.length,'| capWarn:',cap.length,'| fixed:',w.filter\(x=>x.severity==='fixed'\).length\);\(q?.breakdown??[]\).forEach\(b=>{if\(b.earned<b.max\)console.log\(' FAIL',b.label,b.earned+'/'+b.max\)}\);dup.forEach\(x=>console.log\(' [DUP]','sc'+x.sceneNumber+':',x.message.slice\(0,80\)\)\);cap.forEach\(x=>console.log\(' [CAP]','sc'+x.sceneNumber+':',x.message.slice\(0,80\)\)\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('err',e.message\);}}\);")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/generate-v2 -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"categoryId\\":\\"emotional-stories\\",\\"storySeedTopic\\":\\"아버지 서랍 속 낡은 노트\\"}")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); qs=d.get\('qualityScore',{}\); w=d.get\('warnings',[]\); s=d.get\('plan',{}\).get\('scenes',[]\); dW=sum\(1 for x in w if '중복' in x.get\('message',''\) or '유사' in x.get\('message',''\)\); cW=sum\(1 for x in w if x.get\('severity'\)=='warning' and x.get\('message',''\).startswith\('caption'\)\); cF=sum\(1 for x in w if x.get\('severity'\)=='fixed' and x.get\('message',''\).startswith\('caption'\)\); nW=sum\(1 for x in w if 'narration 짧음' in x.get\('message',''\)\); caps=' / '.join\(sc.get\('caption',''\) for sc in s\); wm=[x.get\('message'\) for x in w if x.get\('severity'\)=='warning']; print\(json.dumps\({'N':len\(s\),'g':qs.get\('grade'\),'sc':qs.get\('score'\),'dW':dW,'cW':cW,'cF':cF,'nW':nW,'caps':caps,'warns':wm},ensure_ascii=False\)\)")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/generate-v2 -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"categoryId\\":\\"emotional-stories\\",\\"storySeedTopic\\":\\"할머니의 빈 밥그릇\\"}")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); m=d.get\('_meta',{}\); print\('=== _meta ==='\); print\(json.dumps\(m,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2\)\); print\('=== concreteTopic ==='\); print\(repr\(d.get\('_concreteTopic'\)\)\); print\('=== scenes narration ==='\); [print\(f'  s{s[\\"sceneNumber\\"]}: narration={repr\(s.get\(\\"narration\\"\)\)} caption={repr\(s.get\(\\"caption\\"\)\)}'\) for s in d.get\('scenes',[]\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'scene {s[\\"sceneNumber\\"]}: {s[\\"narration\\"][:50]} | imgPrompt: {s[\\"imagePrompt\\"][:80]}'\) for s in d['plan']['scenes']]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'scene {s[\\"sceneNumber\\"]}: {s[\\"imagePrompt\\"]}'\) for s in d['plan']['scenes'] if s['sceneNumber'] in [6,7,8]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); fmt=d['format']; vs=[s for s in d['streams'] if s['codec_type']=='video'][0]; print\(f'Resolution: {vs[\\"width\\"]}x{vs[\\"height\\"]}'\); print\(f'Duration: {float\(fmt[\\"duration\\"]\):.1f}s'\); print\(f'Size: {int\(fmt[\\"size\\"]\)//1024//1024:.2f}MB'\); audio=[s for s in d['streams'] if s['codec_type']=='audio']; print\(f'Audio: {\\"none\\" if not audio else audio[0][\\"codec_name\\"]}'\)")
